pages.title: Boss Encounters
pages.text: Each biome's final level features a $(b)Boss$() - a powerful enemy that is larger (1.5x size via Pehkui scaling), has boosted HP and attack, wears armor, and glows.$(br2)Defeating the boss unlocks the next biome and grants a $(b)Level Up$()!

pages.title: Warden
pages.text: $(b)Speed:$() 3 | $(b)Special:$() Sonic Boom$(br)The terrifying Deep Dark boss. Slow but devastating. Can use a ranged sonic boom attack that ignores defense. Stay mobile and chip away at its massive HP pool.

pages.title: Ender Dragon
pages.text: $(b)Speed:$() 4 | $(b)Special:$() Devastating Swoop$(br)The final boss of Craftics. Massive, fast, and deals enormous damage. Swoops across the arena hitting everything in its path. Defeating it triggers $(b)New Game+$()!
